issues.title: Complex logic missing reasoning block (Protocol 200)
issues.message: High-complexity algorithms should include a <think> block explaining the strategy and constraints. This prevents 'Mimicry Traps' where code looks right but lacks sound reasoning.

issues.title: Prefer Typia/Fast-JSON-Stringify for serialization
issues.message: For high-performance APIs, JSON.stringify is a bottleneck. Use Typia (100x faster) or fast-json-stringify which utilize schema precomputation (Platformatic/SOTA Pattern).

issues.title: High-frequency JSON serialization (FlatBuffers candidate)
issues.message: SOTA 2026 Research: JSON serialization adds 2-5ms overhead. For high-frequency IPC or checkpoints, use FlatBuffers for zero-copy deserialization and 100x speedup.
